title: Someone Like You
why_this_song: Adele's clean diction and slow tempo help beginners catch every word. The past-simple narration is a perfect bridge into A2 storytelling.
grammar_callouts: past simple narration: I heard / you found / she's married now
wish you the best — idiom for farewell

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "someone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "someone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sometimes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sometimes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I heard that you're settled down
You know how the time flies
Nothing compares, no worries or cares

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I heard that your dreams came true
Only yesterday was the time of our lives
Never mind, I'll find someone like you

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Someone Like You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Someone Like You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Someone Like You", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Someone Like You", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Someone Like You" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Someone Like You" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md:
**Pedagogy:** Adele's production leaves space between lines, helping learners parse word boundaries. Most vocabulary is A1, but past-simple narration pushes into A2.

**Trigger warning:** Break-up themes — some students may find it heavy. Offer an opt-out alternative like 'Someone Like You' thematic discussion.

lines: Never mind, I'll find someone like you
I wish nothing but the best for you, too
Don't forget me, I beg, I remember you said
Sometimes it lasts in love, but sometimes it hurts instead
I heard that you're settled down
That you found a girl and you're married now
I heard that your dreams came true
Guess she gave you things I didn't give to you
